name: Nanning Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanning Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chlor-alkali chemical products in China. It also provides trichloroisocyanuric acid, industrial nitrogen gas, industrial oxygen, trichlorfon powder, polyvinyl chloride resin powder, hydrochloric acid, sodium hypochlorite solution, and liquid sodium hydroxide, as well as liquid chlorine for industrial use. In addition, the company offers caustic soda, chlorinated paraffin, hydrogen chloride, cement, food additives, aluminum foil, calcium carbide, pesticides, and other products. Further, it exports its products. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Nanning, China.
